description_long: This is a pair of open-toe, flat sandals with a rich brown leather-like upper and a thin, slightly textured sole. The sandals feature a closed heel with a strap and buckle fastening around the ankle, providing both support and adjustability. The front of the sandals is rounded and open, exposing the toes, while the sides are mostly open, allowing for breathability. The insole appears to be lightly cushioned and textured for comfort, and the outsole is black with a thin, light-colored edge. The overall design is simple yet elegant, suitable for casual urban wear. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A pair of brown open-toe sandals with ankle straps, closed heels, and flat, thin soles. The design is simple, breathable, and suitable for casual urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open-toe design, rounded toe box, and the start of the ankle straps.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open sides, ankle strap with buckle, and the thin, layered sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed heel, ankle straps, and the back of the flat soles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open sides, strap, and the overall slim profile of the sandals.
attribute_lacing_style: no laces, ankle strap with buckle
